title: Statkraft Stops New Development of Green Hydrogen Projects
content: The company has decided to halt new development of hydrogen, though parts of the portfolio will be further matured before seeking investors to realise the projects. Several projects have received substantial external funding opportunities, and the company is working with authorities to ensure their progression. Statkraft has developed expertise and created value in green hydrogen projects in line with strategy across various European markets, including Norway, Sweden, the UK, Germany, the Netherlands and Italy.
author: Analysts Account
